description.value:
Source: Ariadne's Book of Legends - Alpha v1.2, p. 95.

Tier I: Spellblade

Arcane Edge. When you hit a creature with a melee weapon attack, you can channel magical energy through the blade. The attack deals force damage instead of its usual damage type, and the creature has disadvantage on its first saving throw against a spell you cast before the end of your next turn.

Spell & Blade. When you cast a spell, you can make one melee weapon attack against a creature within your melee range as a bonus action.

Spellstrike. When you cast a spell of 5th level or lower that requires a spell attack roll, you can deliver it through a melee weapon attack instead. Make one melee weapon attack roll. On a hit, the attack deals its normal damage, and the spell takes effect without requiring a separate attack roll. You can only use Spellstrike once per round.

source.custom: Original en-US text from Alpha v1.2
